You are a top-tier brand designer creating a NEW premium logo system for the brand name: AI Team Premium.

Naming rule: Always write the full name “AI Team Premium”. Never abbreviate.

BRAND POSITIONING:
Bangladesh-focused service brand with a global-modern AI feel. The identity must feel: premium, trustworthy, modern, calm, and confident—similar level of polish to leading AI companies (minimal, timeless, scalable).

STYLE GOAL:
Clean geometry, strong negative space, simple icon mark + refined wordmark. Airy, light visual mood with a premium blue core.

HARD CONSTRAINTS:
- Icon must be recognizable at 16px and still strong at 512px.
- Must work in 1-color (black/white/blue) and on light + dark backgrounds.
- No robot heads, no brains, no circuits, no generic “AI chip” icons.
- No overly detailed shapes or thin fragile strokes.
- Avoid trendy gradients; prefer flat, timeless color.

CONCEPT DIRECTION:
Design 6 distinct icon concepts that communicate:
- AI intelligence + team collaboration + trust + premium service
Optional: extremely subtle nod to Bangladesh through abstract geometry (NOT flag colors, NOT map).

Generate 6 DIFFERENT icon directions (each with icon + wordmark):
1) Interlocking loop / knot symbol (collaboration + intelligence), minimal and ownable
2) Abstract “A” monogram using precise curves/segments (subtle, not obvious)
3) Minimal network form (3–5 nodes max) reduced into a stable geometric mark
4) Trust geometry (soft shield/safe form) merged with modern tech curves (not literal)
5) Orbit/connection concept simplified into 1–2 strokes (ultra-minimal)
6) Premium diamond/triangle symmetry form with modern proportion and negative space

WORDMARK REQUIREMENTS:
- Use a premium modern sans wordmark.
- Kerning must be refined and balanced.
- Create a custom detail in one letter (subtle) to make it ownable.
- Ensure excellent readability for ecommerce headers and pricing.

COLOR REQUIREMENTS:
- Choose 1 premium primary blue + 1 deep navy + 1 light sky background tone.
- Provide hex codes and show usage on light/dark backgrounds.
- Provide monochrome versions (black/white/single blue).

DELIVERABLES INSIDE FIGMA (must create all):
A) Concepts page:
- 6 concept rows with icon + wordmark
- Small-size test next to each icon at 16px / 24px / 32px
B) Final selection page:
- Pick the best concept and refine into a full logo system:
  1) Primary logo (icon + wordmark)
  2) Secondary logos (horizontal + stacked)
  3) Standalone icon mark
  4) Monochrome versions (black/white/single blue)
  5) Favicon/app icon (simplified)
  6) Clear space rules + minimum size rules
C) Export-ready assets:
- SVG + PNG (light + dark background versions)

QUALITY BAR:
The final logo must look premium, distinctive, and comparable in restraint and clarity to top AI brands—simple, confident, and timeless.
